title: Add Guess the Flower to games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Name that bloom!
gist.blurb: A new community game just sprouted! Test your botanical knowledge with 'Guess the Flower', an AI-powered quiz that challenges you to identify beautiful blooms.
gist.summary: Added 'Guess the Flower', an AI-powered botanical quiz game, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Players can now test their plant knowledge with a new community-built game that identifies flower species from photos.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a flower guessing game. Visuals should include Polly the bee (who naturally loves flowers) playing a quiz game. The Monitor Robot can act as the quizmaster, showing a picture of a flower on its screen, while Polly tries to guess what it is.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head displaying a bright pixelated sunflower. The small bee mascot hovers nearby wearing tiny reading glasses, looking at the screen with a glowing question mark above her head. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
